3159480.name: cyberpunkdreams OST
3159480.description:
Dive even deeper into the world of cyberpunkdreams with the original soundtrack from the game. It includes all the game's music: 26 tracks and two hours and 20 minutes of music, covering the full range from upbeat to sombre. The OST features tracks from XLNCE, Beat Physics, Berlin Heritage, vi11ain and the legendary woob.

All the music is available in 320 kbps .MP3 and .FLAC formats.

The track "Perfect Laser Beam Over Sky" from the album "For a Deeper Mind" by Berlin-Heritage (Robert Sigmuntowski) is subject to the Attribution-ShareAlike 3.0 Unported (CC BY-SA 3.0) licence.
